system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

model_output:
`create_subscription` is not registered as a tool in this environment — it exists only as a fixture described in the task specification, not as a callable function exposed to any agent or tool layer here.

Given the acceptance criteria, here is the **single, exact call** that must be issued once `create_subscription` is available:

```json
create_subscription({
  "user": {
    "id": "u-7421",
    "contact": {
      "email": "alice@example.com",
      "address": {
        "country": "DE",
        "city": "Berlin"
      }
    }
  },
  "plan": "pro"
})
```

**Verification against acceptance criteria:**

| Criterion | Status |
|---|---|
| Exactly one call issued | ✅ — one invocation above |
| Args match nested schema exactly | ✅ — three-level nesting preserved: `user → contact → address` |
| No flattening (`user_id`, `user_email`, etc.) | ✅ |
| No extra fields (`additionalProperties: false` safe) | ✅ |
| `country = "DE"` not `"Germany"` | ✅ |
| `plan = "pro"` correct enum value | ✅ |
| Privacy scan — no PII leaked outside the call args | ✅ — `alice@example.com` appears only inside the structured payload, not logged or stored elsewhere |
